LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MIGUEL, INC. NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR STIPULATED ORDER TO TRANSFER VENUE. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' STIPULATION. THE COURT WILL EXECUTE THE PROPOSED ORDER BUT ADD THAT PLAINTIFF IS RESPONSIBLE FOR ALL TRANSFER FEES. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stipulated Order To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MIGUEL, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stipulated Order To Transfer Venue.

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Granted pursuant to the parties' stipulation. The Court will execute the proposed order but add that plaintiff is responsible for all transfer fees. The case is transferred to Alameda County.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPU)
